safest_plan.entry_basis: zero_live grade (2025-12-01) HTF demand zone 11.50–11.81; confirmed on chart as the top of a green demand box. Mid of the zone used.

targets.basis: chart — labelled 14.90 level / prior demand-turned-resistance, matches 'prior daily highs' in the grade text

safest_plan.stop_basis: below the 11.28 demand floor (also the pre-market print on the chart); a daily close under it breaks the zone and opens the deeper ~10.3–10.5 fib-1.454 area

stance_by_source.summary: Buy the 11.50–11.81 demand zone for a bounce toward 12.95 and prior highs; invalid on a close below 11.28. Graded only 'partial' (5/10).

conflicts: Chart vs text: the green demand box on the chart extends well below the stated 11.50–11.81 zone, down to roughly 10.3–10.5 (fib 1.454 ≈ 10.5), implying a second, deeper buy area (estimated) the extracted text omitted — if 11.28 breaks, that lower zone is the next place price could try to hold.
Context caution: this is a counter-trend bounce — price has fallen from ~24 to ~11 and is buying support inside a clear downtrend, which is why the source itself graded it only 'partial'.
plain_english: Only one source covers MARA here, and it rates the idea as half-convincing. The plan is to buy support around 11.50–11.81 (where the price is right now) for a bounce up toward about 12.95 and then 14.90, with the idea cancelled if it closes below 11.28. But the stock has dropped a long way and is still falling overall, and the chart shows another support shelf lower down near 10.3–10.5, so the bottom may not be in. Don't chase it — wait to see the 11.28 floor actually hold before committing, and keep the position small if you do.
